parameters.query: SELECT * FROM pending_confirmations WHERE confirmation_id = $1 AND expires_at > NOW()
DELETE FROM pending_confirmations WHERE confirmation_id = $1 RETURNING command, payload, chat_id, lang
SELECT text FROM translations WHERE key = 'cancelled' AND lang = $1 UNION ALL SELECT text FROM translations WHERE key = 'cancelled' AND lang = 'en' LIMIT 1
SELECT text FROM translations WHERE key = 'expired' AND lang = 'en' LIMIT 1
